title: Career Learning Platforms
content:
Online Learning Platforms for CS Students
Morgan State University - Career Resources

---

LEETCODE
LeetCode is a platform for preparing for technical coding interviews. It offers thousands of coding challenges, discussion forums, and company-specific question banks.

Key Features:
- Coding problems sorted by difficulty (Easy, Medium, Hard)
- Company-tagged questions (Google, Amazon, Microsoft, etc.)
- Mock interviews and assessments
- Discussion forums with solution explanations
- Premium subscription for additional features

Website: https://leetcode.com/

---

NEETCODE
NeetCode is a curated collection of LeetCode problems organized by topic and pattern. It's designed to help students systematically prepare for coding interviews.

Features:
- Problems organized by data structure and algorithm patterns
- Video explanations for solutions
- Roadmap for interview preparation
- Free and premium content available

Website: https://neetcode.io/
Recommended Resource: https://blog.algomaster.io/p/15-leetcode-patterns

---

HACKERRANK
HackerRank offers coding challenges, competitions, and skill certifications. Many companies use HackerRank for their technical assessments.

Features:
- Coding challenges across multiple domains
- Skill certifications recognized by employers
- Interview preparation kit
- Company-sponsored coding competitions

Website: https://www.hackerrank.com/

---

CODEACADEMY
Codecademy offers interactive coding courses for beginners and intermediate learners. Courses cover web development, data science, computer science, and more.

Popular Courses:
- Learn Python
- Web Development (HTML, CSS, JavaScript)
- Learn SQL
- Data Science path

Website: https://www.codecademy.com/

---

COURSERA
Coursera partners with universities and companies to offer online courses, certificates, and degrees. Many courses are free to audit.

Recommended CS Courses:
- Algorithms Specialization (Stanford)
- Machine Learning (Andrew Ng)
- Google IT Support Professional Certificate
- IBM Data Science Professional Certificate

Website: https://www.coursera.org/

---

TECHNICAL INTERVIEW PREPARATION TIPS

1. Data Structures to Master:
   - Arrays and Strings
   - Linked Lists
   - Trees and Graphs
   - Hash Tables
   - Stacks and Queues
   - Heaps

2. Algorithms to Know:
   - Sorting (QuickSort, MergeSort)
   - Searching (Binary Search)
   - Dynamic Programming
   - Recursion and Backtracking
   - Graph algorithms (BFS, DFS)

3. Interview Strategies:
   - Practice the STAR method for behavioral questions
   - Communicate your thought process during coding
   - Ask clarifying questions before coding
   - Test your code with edge cases
   - Practice time management (45-60 minutes per problem)
